Input
0 0
1 1

Output
0 XNOR56 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR67 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR70 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
3 NOT1 = NOT(1) = 0

5 NOT3 = NOT(1) = 0
6 NAND14 = NAND(1,1) = 0
7 NAND25 = NAND(0,1) = 1
